title: ProtectedClass
description: A category protected from discrimination under the NYC Human Rights Law (Title 8 of the NYC Administrative Code), with the protected areas in which it applies. NET-NEW / reference: CCHR publishes the law and its protected classes only as prose and PDF on nyc.gov/site/cchr/law/the-law.page and the Legal Library — there is NO machine-readable list and NO Open Data twin. This schema turns that legal vocabulary into a structured, referenceable resource.

label.description: Human-readable name of the protected class.

description.description: Plain-language description of what the class covers.

appliesTo.description: The protected areas in which this class is covered (coverage varies — e.g. Source of Income applies to Housing).

statutoryCitation.description: Citation in the NYC Administrative Code (e.g. '§ 8-107').

guidanceUrl.description: Link to CCHR legal enforcement guidance for this class, where published.
